author: @Rockgamer823
text:
Started playing 10 days ago because of the collab, I'll give my honest review as someone whose only other gacha game has been Blue Archive which I started playing for the same reason (collab with Toaru). 
I think Morimens excels in it's story and gameplay, the game's systems are complete and it's really fulfilling to play once you learn different mechanics from lots of characters. 
The bgm is good, not my favourite but fits the story to a glove, only thing I find a bit annoying is that so many of the bgms start the same way (specially the battle bgms), and when going into your home menu you can't use those bgms because it gets stale so quickly, but I guess that a problem with every gacha game.
If I had one serious criticism about this game is how it's hard to enjoy story and it's gameplay simultaneously, while playing the normal campaign of the game, I'd get so invested in the story but right after I'd have to do a 15 minute exploration to keep reading and that would break my inmers

text:
" You know the dandelion flower? The one that scatters its seeds on the wind?

The wind carries those fluffy seeds far, far from where they were born. What if one of them ends up in a desert where not even a single blade of grass is growing? If you can imagine how that lone seed will feel... then you might be able to understand me.

That seed is still a baby flower. If it does its best, it can turn even a desert into a garden.

Maybe that little seed will decide to thrive. Maybe it will decide to grow and multiply, so that it can turn the whole desert into a field of dandelions.

What do you think can give it the strength to do so?

All it needs... is to be loved by just one person in the whole desert. All it needs is to be told how pretty dandelions are."

- Saya

author: @juakored
text:
It's really good that they're giving people a free copy of her no matter what, but having to wait and go through so much content in order to get her or even know if she's gonna be worth the effort, just so that they can artificially keep player numbers up even so slightly for a bit longer is kinda shitty. 

Just think about it from a standard Gacha collab experience. 

- You've never played X game. 

- They make a Collab with Y which is more popular than X.

- You give players some shitty character for free (that's where this game is above average, but it's also not like there's many characters they could've given away with this Collab either).

- you give players some incentive to stay (250 pulls is what I've heard they're going with).

*now's where the issues begin.*

-  There's no banner yet... I don't think I've ever seen that before on any of the gachas I've played...

- you can't test the character beforehand to even see if she's gonna be worth staying for, if they did her justic

author: @SleepyGuppy
text:
Some things to note: Salvador isn't the father of all, more a priest of the father of all for that matter.

As for what you do with him in a team, most things are covered in the video like in the past few videos, so good, but there's quite a few more things that you would want to do with him.

1st, Birth of a Soul, a BP WoD that grants Max HP +10%, The Healing and Shield provided by the wielder increase by 10%, both of these effects "After playing the wielder's "Strike", restore 6% of lost HP. After playing the wielder's "Defense"' gain Shield equal to 6% of current life. This effect can trigger up to 1 time each per turn." which is perfect for any team with Salvador, so it's worth looking it up to if you are decided to use him in a team and have some cash to spare.

2nd and more budget, Horla (E1 at minimum), mainly in Grief stance "All Awakeners' Shield Generated, HP Recovery, and STR Reduction effect +21%. Increase the HP Recovery of Resplendent Chapters." so that you gain more Crim

author: @GunAndSwordGame
text:
Lại rơi rớt thông tin 😭Mình bổ sung ở đây nhá
1, Corrosions là hiệu ứng scale theo chỉ số STR của Saya, stack như một status bình thường. Khi được kích hoạt bằng đòn đánh hoặc xúc tu, nó sẽ tự tiêu thụ lượng stack tương đương với sát thương gây ra để gây x3 lượng dam kích hoạt đấy
Corrosions của Saya chỉ là một yếu tố bổ trợ, trong khi Castor mới là Carry Corrosion đích thực, nên Wheel/Trấn/Vũ khí của Saya mới tối ưu nhất khi đi cùng Castor
2, Nếu ai vẫn có điều kiện đầu tư, thì điểm dừng phù hợp là E1 hoặc E3 (2/4 copy), và không nên OE (8 copy để mở ulti 2) vì tích vòng ulti đầu đã sẵn mệt nghỉ rồi 🥵
